hero.title: Data Engineer
hero.subtitle: Turning raw data into powerful insights. 3+ years designing scalable data solutions with Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric & DBT.
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Data Engineer with 3 years of experience designing scalable data solutions using Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, and DBT. I specialize in ETL development, Dimensional Modeling, Medallion Architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and data governance.
about.p2: I'm passionate about transforming raw data into actionable business insights. I thrive on building robust data pipelines and architecting modern data platforms that drive better decision-making.
about.p3: When I'm not engineering data pipelines, I enjoy exploring new cloud technologies, working on certifications, and mentoring peers in the data engineering space.
skills.title: Skills & Technologies
experience.title: Experience
exp.hexaview.b1: Gained expertise in scalable data platforms using Microsoft Fabric with Medallion Architecture.
exp.hexaview.b2: Performed data ingestion, transformation, and data modeling integrating with Azure Fabric and DBT.
exp.hexaview.b3: Gained hands-on experience in CI/CD deployment using Azure DevOps and Git across different tenants.
exp.celebal.b1: Expertise in designing, implementing, and maintaining scalable data pipelines in Databricks.
exp.celebal.b2: Proficient in ETL processes and data warehouses.
exp.celebal.b3: Transformed raw data into meaningful insights using Databricks Unity Catalog, Azure DevOps, and Power BI.
projects.title: Key Projects
projects.f2.desc: Modernized fintech data platform with Azure Fabric and Medallion Architecture.
projects.f2.b1: Integrated Fintech source with Azure Fabric using Medallion Architecture to modernize workflows and enable Power BI.
projects.f2.b2: Automated multi-env deployments through Git-based CI/CD pipelines.
projects.f2.b3: Implemented dimensional modeling across data structures for quality and lineage tracking.
projects.f2.b4: Implemented data governance via Microsoft Purview.
projects.petronas.desc: Migrated legacy Talend ETL jobs to Databricks for a major energy company.
projects.petronas.b1: Evaluated Talend jobs and identified transformation logic for migration to Databricks.
projects.petronas.b2: Designed and developed efficient SQL queries to replicate Talend workflows in Databricks.
projects.petronas.b3: Created onboarding and transformation scripts to migrate and ensure data consistency.
projects.petronas.b4: Created Workflows and DLTs through CI/CD across environments.
projects.petronas.b5: Performed testing and reconciliation to validate accuracy and integrity of migrated data.
projects.ihcl.desc: Optimized equipment effectiveness using IoT data and Databricks analytics.
projects.ihcl.b1: Assisted in calculating Availability, Performance, and Quality metrics effectively.
projects.ihcl.b2: Integrated IoT devices with ADLS Gen2 via IoT Hub for data storage.
projects.ihcl.b3: Retrieved and transformed IoT data using Medallion Architecture and created DLT pipelines.
projects.ihcl.b4: Designed data quality dashboards for real-time insights and performance monitoring.
projects.ihcl.b5: Created dashboards for data analysis using Lakeview Dashboard and Power BI.
projects.cocacola.desc: Migrated SharePoint data to Databricks for a global beverage leader.
projects.cocacola.b1: Processed and managed data from SharePoint and Databricks sources with historical and incremental loads.
projects.cocacola.b2: Extracted, transformed, and cleaned structured and unstructured data from SharePoint.
projects.cocacola.b3: Applied custom transformation logic per business needs for reporting and analysis.
projects.cocacola.b4: Performed data validation and reconciliation, delivering business-ready datasets for Power BI visualization.
